title: Lemonade Inc (LMND) Q3 2023 Earnings Summary
text: Lemonade Inc reported strong Q3 2023 results with several notable improvements year-over-year. In-Force Premium (IFP): Grew 18% to $719 million. Gross Profit: Increased 170% to $22 million. Operating Expenses: Declined 11% to $98 million. Net Loss: Improved 33% to $62 million. Gross Loss Ratio: Improved to 83%, an 11 percentage point advancement. The company demonstrated substantial revenue growth with a 27% increase in Gross Earned Premium to $173.2 million and a 55% revenue surge to $114.5 million. Cash and investments totaled approximately $945 million, while insurance subsidiaries maintained about $109 million in surplus. Management provided updated guidance indicating the company expects to achieve cash-flow positive status in late 2025, sooner than previously communicated. Adjusted EBITDA profitability is projected for 2026. The company highlighted its growing customer base, nearing two million users, and credited its technological capabilities and reinsurance strategy with supporting financial performance despite seasonal challenges and natural catastrophes.
